title: RHCSA 10 Lab 09: Loop Script
description: Create a shell script that loops over input

tasks: On client, make the script executable, read /etc/passwd, and overwrite /root/rhcsa10-lines.txt with every account name that starts with r.
hints: Use a while read loop or awk.
Account names are the first colon-separated field.
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
task_titles: Make the script executable, read /etc/passwd, and overwrite
solution_commands:
cat > /usr/local/bin/rhcsa10-lines <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
: > /root/rhcsa10-lines.txt
while IFS=: read -r name _; do
  case "$name" in
    r*) echo "$name" >> /root/rhcsa10-lines.txt ;;
  esac
done < /etc/passwd
EOF
